purpose: Models the reflexive loop where falling headline inflation loosens financial conditions, extending credit cycles while the underlying inflation regime remains unresolved
components: Transmission: loosened financial conditions via rates expectations, credit spreads, equity valuations
Credit extension: credit cycle extended by 12-18 months beyond fundamentals
Resolution: delayed but amplified correction when underlying regime asserts
Exception condition: genuine productivity acceleration >2.5% validates the loosening ex post
current_assessment: 4/5 historical episodes (1967-68, 1984-85, 1995-96, 2005-06) show the pattern. The 1995-96 exception required productivity growth absent today. Directly challenges near-term credit repricing timing assumptions.
limitations: Exception condition (productivity) is hard to identify in real time
Does not specify the magnitude of the eventual correction
Interaction with covenant-lite and fiscal support is unprecedented
